# Carlton Hotel Gent

## Overview
Carlton Hotel Gent is a 3-star boutique hotel with 22 rooms, located at Koningin Astridlaan 138, 9000 Ghent, Belgium. It is a two-minute walk from Ghent's main train station (Gent-Sint-Pieters).

## Contact
- Phone: +32 9 222 88 36
- Email: info@carltongent.be
- Website: https://www.carltongent.be
- WhatsApp: +32 9 222 88 36
- Instagram: @carltonhotelgent
- Address: Koningin Astridlaan 138, 9000 Gent, Belgium
- VAT: BE0841405912

## Booking
- Booking engine: https://bookingengine.mylighthouse.com/carlton-hotel-gent-gent/Rooms/Select
- Check-in: 15:00 - 22:00 (contact hotel for late arrival)
- Check-out: before 11:00
- Languages: Dutch, English, French, German

## Room Types
- Deluxe Room (Double): Queen bed (160x200), open bathroom, 12m² terrace, 2 TVs, minibar, Nespresso
- Classic Room (Double or Twin): King bed (180x200) or 2 singles, shower or bath, TV, minibar, kettle
- Standard Room (Double, Twin or Triple): King bed (180x200), 2 or 3 singles (90x200), shower or bath, TV, minibar

## Breakfast
- Served daily: 07:00-10:00 (Mon-Fri), 07:30-10:30 (Sat-Sun)
- Continental and cooked breakfast: eggs to order, fresh pastries, fruit, fresh juice, charcuterie, cheese
- Not included in room rate

## Services & Amenities
- Free Wi-Fi
- Free luggage storage (before check-in and on checkout day)
- City maps and guides at reception
- Housekeeping included
- Laundry service available

## Parking
- Private parking: €18/night
- 6 EV charging stations: €0.56/kWh

## Sustainability
- Green Key certified hotel
- Partnership with Go Forest: 20% of parking revenue invested in planting trees in Peru

## Guest Reviews
- Booking.com: 8.9/10 (1,400+ verified reviews)
- Guests praise: breakfast quality, friendly staff, quiet and spacious rooms, convenient location near train station

## Location
- 2-minute walk from Gent-Sint-Pieters train station
- Tram connection to city center (15-20 minute walk)
- City of Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium
